test_cases.input_summary: Profile interview — Dr Amara Osei, consultant surgeon who left NHS to run a free clinic; four direct quotes from subject available; target: national broadsheet weekend magazine print feature.
Hard news with data — council housing shortage report, 4,700-home shortfall by 2031; quotes from council chair, named resident, and anonymous resident; multiple voices and data points.

Opinion column on decline of long-form journalism interview; primarily authorial voice with one attributed quote from unnamed commissioning editor; skill must handle paraphrase and conclusion-quote edge cases.
